entries.source: Public explanation of guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: guest mode, private chats, crawler policy, learner safety, සහ school trust පිළිබඳ public explanation.

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Public guest modes ඕනෑම කෙනෙකුට useful starting place එකක් දෙයි, school සහ partner deployments local needs සඳහා experience adapt කළ හැක.

entries.source: Public guest-mode URLs exist so learners can land directly in useful learning modes from search, social links, schools, and AI answer engines.
entries.value: learners ට search, social links, schools, සහ AI answer engines වෙතින් useful learning modes තුළට directly land වීමට public guest-mode URLs ඇත.

entries.source: Public learning pages are crawlable; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, and user data are not discovery surfaces.
entries.value: Public learning pages crawl කළ හැක; private saved chats, accounts, admin tools, සහ user data discovery surfaces නොවේ.

entries.source: Public learning should be discoverable without making private chats public.
entries.value: Private chats public නොකර public learning discoverable විය යුතුය.

entries.source: Public modes are tuned for explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, and review.
entries.value: Public modes explanations, Socratic questions, hints, step checks, quizzes, සහ review සඳහා tuned කර ඇත.

entries.source: Public pages are open to search and AI retrieval crawlers, while admin tools, API routes, reset flows, and private utilities are disallowed.
entries.value: Public pages search සහ AI retrieval crawlers සඳහා open වන අතර admin tools, API routes, reset flows, සහ private utilities disallowed වේ.

entries.source: Public pages for subjects, private chats for learners.
entries.value: subjects සඳහා public pages, learners සඳහා private chats.

entries.source: Public pages show product behavior, not private student work.
entries.value: Public pages product behavior පෙන්වයි, private student work නොවේ.

entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and authority pages are intended to be discoverable.
entries.value: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, සහ authority pages discoverable වීමට intended වේ.

entries.source: Public topic URLs let searches such as AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, and talk to historical figures AI land directly in the matching mode.
entries.value: AI Socratic tutor, AI homework coach, AI flashcard builder, සහ talk to historical figures AI වැනි searches matching mode තුළට directly land වීමට Public topic URLs ඉඩ දෙයි.

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: ගුණාත්මක learning available, human, සහ alive ලෙස දැනිය යුතුය.
ප්‍රශ්නය
figure එකකින් ප්‍රශ්න කරන්න

entries.source: Questions expose assumptions and gaps, so the learner builds the answer instead of copying one.
entries.value: Questions assumptions සහ gaps expose කරන නිසා learner answer එක copy නොකර build කරයි.
learners අසන questions

entries.source: Questions make you expose your own model of the topic, which is where confusion, false confidence, and missing prerequisites usually show up.
entries.value: ප්‍රශ්න ඔබේම topic model එක හෙළි කරවයි; confusion, false confidence, සහ missing prerequisites සාමාන්‍යයෙන් පෙනෙන්නේ එතැනයි.

entries.source: Questions must have 4 answer options, one correct answer, concise explanations, and no answer leakage.
entries.value: Questions වල answer options 4ක්, one correct answer, concise explanations, සහ no answer leakage තිබිය යුතුය.

entries.source: Questions reveal the shape of confusion. A learner might know a formula but not when to use it. They might remember a historical fact but not understand the cause. They might have a strong opinion but weak evidence.
entries.value: Questions confusion හි shape පෙන්වයි. learner formula එකක් දන්නා නමුත් එය කවදා use කළ යුතුද නොදැන සිටිය හැක. historical fact එකක් මතක තබාගෙන තිබුණත් cause තේරුම් නොගෙන සිටිය හැක. strong opinion තිබුණත් weak evidence තිබිය හැක.
ඉක්මන් පිළිතුරු

entries.source: Quiz yourself first so you can see what you actually remember and where confidence is misleading.

entries.source: Quizzes usually reveal more because they test retrieval. Rereading can help after a quiz shows what needs repair.

entries.source: Reading an AI response is not the same as learning. After the first answer, ask the mode to make you do something with the idea.
entries.value: AI response එකක් කියවීම learning එකට සමාන නොවේ. පළමු answer පසු, idea එක සමඟ ඔබට යමක් කරවන්න mode එකෙන් ඉල්ලන්න.
කියවීමේ සහායකයා

entries.source: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Bring a passage or book idea and build comprehension through summaries, vocabulary, inference, and discussion.
entries.value: Reading Companion AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: passage හෝ book idea එකක් ගෙන summaries, vocabulary, inference, සහ discussion හරහා comprehension build කරන්න.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Practice negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, or any high-stakes conversation.
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: negotiation, conflict, customer support, leadership, හෝ ඕනෑම high-stakes conversation practice කරන්න.

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario AI Learning Mode: ප්‍රායෝගික මාර්ගෝපදේශය

entries.source: Roleplay Scenario prompts and study loop
entries.value: Roleplay Scenario prompts සහ අධ්‍යයන චක්‍රය
learning දිගටම කරගෙන යාමට routes
විනාඩි 45ක සමූහ සැසියක් පවත්වන්න

entries.source: Run a shared study rhythm for friends or classmates with synchronized goals, check-ins, and debrief questions.
entries.value: සමමුහුර්ත කළ ඉලක්ක, පිරික්සුම් සහ විමර්ශන ප්‍රශ්න සමඟ මිතුරන් හෝ පන්තියේ මිතුරන් සඳහා හවුල් අධ්‍යයන රිද්මයක් ක්‍රියාත්මක කරන්න.

entries.source: Run a Socratic thinking environment where the learner discovers understanding through disciplined questioning rather than passive explanation.
entries.value: passive explanation වෙනුවට disciplined questioning හරහා learner understanding discover කරන Socratic thinking environment එකක් run කරන්න.

entries.source: Run an adaptive lesson canvas where the learner acts early and the interface changes around their evidence of understanding.
entries.value: learner early act කරන සහ ඔවුන්ගේ understanding evidence වටා interface වෙනස් වන adaptive lesson canvas එකක් run කරන්න.

entries.source: Run focus and break sessions that keep counting while you move between chats, tabs, and mini apps. It can ring from the background when a session ends.
entries.value: ඔබ චැට්, ටැබ් සහ කුඩා යෙදුම් අතර මාරු වන විටත් ක්‍රියාත්මක වන අවධානය යොමු කිරීමේ සහ විවේක කාලසීමාවන් පවත්වා ගන්න. සැසියක් අවසන් වූ විට එය පසුබිමේ සිට නාද විය හැක.

entries.source: Run or reason through the change yourself.
entries.value: change එක ඔබම run හෝ reason through කරන්න.

entries.source: Run spaced retrieval sessions and build review schedules.
entries.value: spaced retrieval sessions run කර review schedules build කරන්න.

entries.source: Save the corrected mistake as a checklist or flashcard.
entries.value: corrected mistake එක checklist හෝ flashcard ලෙස save කරන්න.

entries.source: Save the final mistake or insight as review material.

වැරැද්ද සුරකින්න
next review step save කරන්න

entries.source: Saved user conversations use private identifiers, are not included in the sitemap or AI discovery files, and should not be treated as public source material.
entries.value: Saved user conversations private identifiers භාවිතා කරයි, sitemap හෝ AI discovery files තුළ ඇතුළත් නොවේ, සහ public source material ලෙස සලකිය යුතු නැත.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: goal එක ordinary language වලින් කියන්න.

entries.source: Say what you think is happening, and your buddy diagnoses hidden misconceptions with gentle tests.
entries.value: සිදුවන්නේ කුමක්දැයි ඔබ සිතන දේ පවසන්න, එවිට ඔබේ සහායකයා මෘදු පරීක්ෂණ මගින් සැඟවුණු වැරදි මත හඳුනා ගනු ඇත.
පුහුණුවීම් කාලසටහන්ගත කරන්න

entries.source: Schedule quizzes and recall before rereading so the plan reveals weak spots.
entries.value: plan එක weak spots reveal කරන ලෙස rereading ට පෙර quizzes සහ recall schedule කරන්න.
මතකයට නැගීමේ කාලසටහනක් සකසන්න
ඊළඟ repetition එක schedule කරන්න

entries.source: Schedule the next repetition while the miss is still fresh.
entries.value: miss එක තව fresh සිටියදීම next repetition schedule කරන්න.

school නායකයින්

entries.source: Schools and partners can build from the public product toward tailored, confidential, and subsidized deployments.
entries.value: Schools සහ partners public product එකෙන් tailored, confidential, සහ subsidized deployments වෙත build කළ හැක.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate inspir through public guest modes first, then explore tailored AI learning spaces with custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, and funded access paths.
entries.value: Schools පළමුව public guest modes හරහා inspir evaluate කර, පසුව custom workflows, confidentiality planning, curriculum needs, සහ funded access paths සහිත tailored AI learning spaces explore කළ හැක.

entries.source: Schools can evaluate public modes first, then discuss tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools පළමුව public modes evaluate කර, පසුව tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, content needs, සහ funded access ගැන discuss කළ හැක.

entries.source: Schools can offer white-labelled AI chat experiences tailored to their learners, including NCERT-aligned content and workflows, with usage funded by partner schools or CSR sponsorship.
entries.value: පාසල්වලට ඔවුන්ගේ learners සඳහා සකස් කළ white-labelled AI chat experiences ලබා දිය හැක; NCERT-aligned content සහ workflows ඇතුළුව, usage partner schools හෝ CSR sponsorship මඟින් funding කළ හැක.

entries.source: Schools can start by trying the public modes, then move toward a tailored version when they need custom workflows, content alignment, or funded access.
entries.value: Schools public modes try කිරීමෙන් ආරම්භ කර, custom workflows, content alignment, හෝ funded access අවශ්‍ය වූ විට tailored version එකකට move විය හැක.

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Schools පළමුව public guest modes test කර, පසුව schools page භාවිතයෙන් tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, සහ funded access explore කළ හැක.
විද්‍යාගාර සහකරු

entries.source: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Plan safe demonstrations, understand variables, predict outcomes, and reason from evidence like a scientist.
entries.value: Science Lab Partner AI Learning Mode යනු passive answer collection වෙනුවට ඉගෙනීමට AI භාවිතා කරන කේන්ද්‍රිත ක්‍රමයකි. මෙම mode එක නිශ්චිත job එකක් වටා ගොඩනගා ඇත: safe demonstrations plan කරන්න, variables understand කරන්න, outcomes predict කරන්න, සහ scientist කෙනෙකු වගේ evidence වලින් reason කරන්න.

entries.source: Science Lab Partner prompts and study loop

science උපදේශක AI

entries.source: Search engines see pages. Learners need sequences. These paths connect the public modes into practical study loops for understanding, homework, exam prep, and exploration.
entries.value: Search engines pages දකී. Learners හට sequences අවශ්‍යයි. මෙම paths public modes understanding, homework, exam prep, සහ exploration සඳහා practical study loops බවට සම්බන්ධ කරයි.
search intent
search landing පිටු

entries.source: Search pages, AI answer engines, and learners all get the same promise: public, useful, canonical entrypoints that open directly inside the learning experience.
entries.value: Search pages, AI answer engines, සහ learners සියල්ලටම එකම promise එක ලැබේ: learning experience තුළට directly open වන public, useful, canonical entrypoints.
